contentFieldValue.data:
Added

  • Add mandatory strong password policy on Signup and Reset password pages
  • Display instance ID on Metrics tooltip
  • Implement paginated infinite scroll on Logs view
  • Add pagination to Activities, Builds, and Deployments
  • Add Jenkins Activities integration
  • Include CLI metadata for CI build URLs into activities if available
  • Add activity for created environment
  • Add user name to collaborator, environment variables, and custom domain activities
  • Add expiration time for cookies
  • Implement responsive design on "Team", "Deploy Build To", "Environment Variables", and "Custom Domains" pages
  • Validate if the user is a contributor or higher on any sibling environment
  • Add action menu when hovering Service Avatars
  • Add public/private pill to Services list
  • Add polyfill to support IE11

Changed

  • Allow "Admin" roles to delete services
  • Allow "Contributor" roles to create services
  • Change memory metrics to always be in MB
  • Accommodate longer image names in Service Tooltip
  • Adapt Transfer metrics based on the proper order of magnitude
  • Show skeletons until Volumes info is loaded
  • Improve render performance of list services page
  • Improve performance of projects list page
  • Show Service Popover to the Service Avatar on Service Pages
  • Update the Backup page to show the real frequency and retention period
  • Change real-time endpoint for deployments page and updates environment cards
  • Define logs prefix color based on service id
  • Update error pages to new design
  • Update service page header to new design
  • Update pill status component to new design
  • Display manual upscale activity as a user activity
  • Display only services that are ready to be deployed to an environment

Fixed

  • Fix password validation when 1Password X is enabled
  • Fix real-time + pagination on Deployments page
  • Fix field validation onChange Password and Reset Password
  • Fix error when filtering logs
  • Fix "Mark all alert as read" functionality
  • Fix Service Popover closing randomly
  • Fix Link to builds from activity pill
  • Fix Timestamp disappear after few seconds
  • Fix Deploy Builds page losing timestamp
  • Fix blinking on the logs page
  • Fix backup size at Backup Restore page
  • Fix backup in progress look and feel
  • Fix flaky backup status while backup in progress
  • Fix VPN disconnection error handling
  • Fix Restore backup layout on IE 11
  • Fix No Services text layout on IE 11
  • Fix Services Popover look and feel on IE 11
  • Fix VPN Port Forwarding style on IE 11
  • Fix bug when VPN shows as disconnected inside the project settings, but the VPN server returns connected
